cards.title: Make it mobile friendly (responsive, touch support, etc)
cards.body:
- Add viewport meta tag and responsive canvas sizing
- Implement touch event handlers (touchstart, touchmove, touchend) to replace mouse events on mobile
- Prevent default touch behaviors (scroll, zoom) during gameplay
- Auto-fire on touch (don't require holding)
- Scale UI elements for smaller screens
- Test on both portrait and landscape orientations
- Add mobile-specific CSS (cursor: default on touch devices, hide HUD elements on very small screens)

cards.title: Create background music
cards.body:
- Add procedural background music loop via Web Audio API
- Create a subtle ambient synth track (no external files)
- Use short looping pattern (2-4 measures) with layered oscillators
- Add volume control / mute toggle in UI
- BGM should fade out during Game Over, resume on new game
- Ensure BGM doesn't overpower laser/explosion sounds

cards.title: Change enemy generation to groups of rows
cards.body:
- Replace random wave spawning with structured row-based formations
- Spawn enemies in grid-like rows (classic Space Invaders style)
- Rows descend gradually toward the player
- Each row can contain different enemy types (e.g., front row = babies, back row = mediums)
- Boss still appears every 5 levels (no rows, just single boss + mini-swarm)
- Update level progression logic for row clear conditions
- Keep sine wave movement for individual enemies within the row formation

cards.title: Enemies shoot lasers toward player and damage player upon hit
cards.body:
- Implement enemy laser system: enemies periodically fire toward player position
- Small octopus fires straight down
- Medium octopus fires aimed shots toward player
- Boss has rapid-fire multi-laser barrage (in addition to existing ink blobs)
- Collision detection: enemy laser vs player circle
- On hit: player takes damage (10 HP), invulnTimer triggers, screen flash, shake
- Visual: red laser trails, spawn particle sparks on impact
- Audio: short distinct enemy-fire sound (pitch down sweep)
- Difficulty scales with level (fire rate increases, accuracy improves)

cards.title: Make background music louder
cards.body:
- Increase BGM master gain volume significantly (current: 0.06, target: 0.15-0.2)
- Increase bass pad gain
- Increase arpeggio gain
- Ensure BGM is still balanced with other sounds (not drowning explosions/lasers)
- Test the overall audio mix in-game

cards.title: Increase amount of enemies per level
cards.body:
- Increase rows per level: current formula min(2 + floor(level/2), 6), increase to min(3 + floor(level/2), 8)
- Increase columns per row: current min(3 + floor(level/3), 8), increase to min(4 + floor(level/3), 10)
- Optionally add a second set of rows that spawn after first wave is cleared
- Ensure levels feel progressively harder but fair
- Balance enemy density so screen is not overcrowded at high levels
- Test at levels 1, 3, 5, 10 for visual density

cards.title: Create new enemy: Crabby Squid - horizontal traveling crab-like enemy
cards.body:
- Define a new enemy type 'crab' in config.js with stats: hp 15, speed 2.0, score 15, color orange (#FF8800)
- Size: ~30px
- Create pixel art grid for crab-squid hybrid (8x6 or similar) - should resemble a crab with squid-like features
- Movement: travels HORIZONTALLY across the screen (left to right or right to left) at random y positions mid-screen
- On reaching screen edge, reverses direction or exits and respawns from opposite side
- Animation: side-to-side leg/tentacle wiggle while moving
- Can fire small projectiles downward while moving
- Spawns periodically (not in rows) - maybe 1-2 per level, or every few seconds during a level
- Drop from crabby squid has small chance of powerup
- Add to pixel art preview on start screen
